g.text: 16-Byte Stack Alignment Requirement (System V AMD64 ABI)
T3: Final Frame for Nested CALL

div.p: Why: SSE/AVX (XMM/YMM) registers require 16/32 byte alignment for memory ops.

g.text: mov rbp, rsp ; Set new frame pointer

div.p: Alignment Invariant: RSP must be 16-byte aligned immediately before any CALL.
Formula: N_pushes = Callee-saved regs Size = (N_pushes * 8) If (Size + Locals) % 16 != 0: sub rsp, 8 ; Add padding
